name: Institutional Management
description: Unit management, HR administration, financial circuits, and staff operations across the European Commission.

skills.description: Personalise this plugin to your DG, unit, and management responsibilities
Unit management, CDR, work programme, staff decisions, AMP
Operational coordination, quality review, deadline tracking, A.I. acting
ARES management, MIPS/C2 missions, SYSPER, PQ tracking, action trackers
TA/CA contract management, CEOS, CAST, recruitment, renewal decisions
ABAC financial circuit, FR 2018/1046, commitment and payment orders
Annex VIII pension calculations, PMO entitlements, pension projections
Draft SMART CDR objectives, end-year appraisals, and competency assessments in SYSPER
